name: painmatrix
description: Neuroscience-Based AI Pain Simulation Engine - 5-level pain with Aδ/C fiber, NMDA, Neuromatrix, Damasio somatic markers. Task-driven motivation, proactive task requests, daily self-evolution, resilience tracking. Pure-local, no AI model, cross-platform.
author: PainMatrix Community
notes: No external dependencies. Requires Python 3.8+. Cross-platform: Windows/Linux/macOS. v5.0 adds task-driven motivation and self-evolution system.
